metadata.rationale: 样本文本把“热搜与博主转述/网传物料”包装成“耀客传媒官方公众号发布公告并披露完整项目细节”，但未给出任何可核验的官方来源与证据支撑，关键公告内容属于凭空编造。同时配图海报为AI生成物，且海报小字指向“数字人形象合作/虚拟代言人计划”，与正文描述的“签约AI演员并进组参演拍摄”在语义上不一致，整体结论不成立。

prediction.predicted_label: verdict=Mostly False | taxonomy=T1 Fabrication; V1 Synthetic Visual Content; C2 Contextual Inconsistency

best_trajectory.thought: Based on the analysis, the image contains the Yule logo at the top, the headline '官宣签约 AI演员' (Official Announcement: Signing AI Actors), and the specific footer text '数字人形象合作 / 虚拟代言人计划' (Digital Human Image Cooperation / Virtual Ambassador Plan). The visual description matches the provided image exactly, supporting the news text's claim.
best_trajectory.action: Finish[IMAGE_SUPPORT] The image provides visual evidence that supports the news text. It displays the Yule ('娱乐-YULE') logo, the headline 'Official Announcement: Signing AI Actors', and the subtitle 'Digital Human Image Cooperation / Virtual Ambassador Plan', matching the description provided.
best_trajectory.observation: Could not parse action: Finish[IMAGE_SUPPORT] The image provides visual evidence that supports the news text. It displays the Yule ('娱乐-YULE') logo, the headline 'Official Announcement: Signing AI Actors', and the subtitle 'Digital Human Image Cooperation / Virtual Ambassador Plan', matching the description provided.

best_trajectory.thought: The image footer contains the text '数字人形象合作 / 虚拟代言人计划', which matches the specific details mentioned in the news text. The presence of the poster serves as the required proof that the text is not a rumor, verifying the claim.

Based on the news text, the company is referred to as "Yake Media" (耀客传媒) and the project is called "Yake · AI Performance Plan". The provided image contains text "YULE" in the logo and copyright. This suggests a name mismatch. I will use the Entity tool to extract text from the image to confirm the entity names before finishing. I will also use VQA to specifically query about the logo text.
best_trajectory.observation:
- **“娱乐‑YULE” / YULE (logo/brand mark at top)** — High certainty (clearly visible text + logo).
- **Chinese headline: “官宣签约 AI演员” (Official announcement: signing AI actors)** — High certainty (large, legible text).
- **English subtitle: “OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT: SIGNING AI ACTORS”** — High certainty (legible).
- **Tagline/Project name: “代号：#智耀计划#”** — High certainty (legible).
- **Chinese line: “数字人形象合作 / 虚拟代言人计划”** — High certainty (legible).
- **English line: “DIGITAL HUMAN COOPERATION / VIRTUAL AMBASSADOR PLAN”** — High certainty (legible).
- **Date: “2026.03”** — High certainty (legible).
- **Copyright/organization: “© 2026 YULE ENTERTAINMENT MEDIA CO., LTD.” (and Chinese rights line)** — High certainty (legible).
- **Two human-like figures (female-presenting left, male-presenting right), faces intentionally blurred** — High certainty (clearly depicted as stylized/CG “digital human” characters; not identifiable as real people).
- **Futuristic sci‑fi corridor/interior + holographic HUD/network graphics around figures** — Medium–high certainty (visual context; no specific real-world location identifiable).

best_trajectory.thought: To be absolutely certain, I will use VQA to ask for the specific company name displayed on the image and confirm if it matches "Yake Media" or "耀客传媒". Although Entity already showed "YULE", a direct VQA question ensures I haven't missed any other branding related to "Yake".
best_trajectory.action: VQA[What company name is displayed on the logo at the top?]
best_trajectory.observation: The company name displayed on the logo at the top is **YULE** (specifically, it reads **/>娱乐-YULE**).

best_trajectory.thought: Entity extraction has confirmed the image displays the company name as 'YULE' (优乐娱乐) and the project name as '#智耀计划#'. The news text explicitly states the company is '耀客传媒' (Yake Media) and the project is '耀客·AI表演计划'. The company name and project name are distinct. While this already indicates a Mismatch, I will propose a VQA action to verify the project name text in the image one more time to ensure no subtle translation errors exist, before confirming the final judgment.
best_trajectory.action: VQA[What is the Chinese project code or name displayed in the center-lower section of the poster?]
best_trajectory.observation: The Chinese project code or name displayed in the center-lower section is **#智耀计划#** (Zhì Yào Jì Huà), which translates to "Intelligent Splendor Plan" or "Smart Glory Plan". It is preceded by the characters "代号" (Dàimào), meaning "Codename".

best_trajectory.thought: Entity extraction has identified the company as "YULE ENTERTAINMENT MEDIA CO., LTD." and the project as "#智耀计划#" (#Smart Glory Plan). The news text specifies "耀客传媒" (Yake Media) and "Yake · AI Performance Plan". The company name 'Yule' differs from 'Yake', and the project names are completely different. This constitutes a definitive mismatch.

prediction.taxonomy_rationale: The text fabricates an announcement by "Yao Ke," while the image displays a different entity ("Yule") and project name, indicating entity fabrication and contextual mismatch; the image itself is clearly AI-generated.
